name: Khalid Al-Zahrani
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم خالد، لاحظنا أنك تحضر الدروس بانتظام وهذا رائع جداً! 🌟 لديك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك للوصول لدرجة أعلى من 61. دعنا نخطط معاً لتحقيق ذلك.
action: Call or WhatsApp Khalid today to introduce yourself, identify any learning obstacles blocking his progress from 61% to passing, and create a targeted study plan for the next 6 days before the quiz.
reasoning: Khalid has never been contacted despite consistent attendance and a below-passing quiz score. Early facilitator intervention during this 6-day window before the next quiz offers a critical opportunity to prevent further academic decline and build an essential support relationship.
